Trusted by 10,000+ Construction Companies Worldwide

Interior companies, building contractors, EPC firms, and infrastructure developers across India and the Middle East trust SiteFlow to replace WhatsApp, Excel, and Tally with one connected construction platform.

Complete ERP Platform for Every Type of Construction Business

Whether you’re building high-rises in Dubai, managing infrastructure in India, or executing interior projects, SiteFlow adapts to your workflow.

01

Developers &
Owners

SiteFlow helps developers and owners gain complete visibility across budgets, site progress and cash flow. Track multiple projects in real time, monitor costs and stay in control from planning to handover.

02

Design-Build &
Interior Firms

Streamline design-to-execution workflows, manage RFQs and coordinate vendors from a single system. SiteFlow helps design-build and interior firms reduce delays and deliver projects faster with real-time visibility.

03

Contractors (Civil, Interior & Infrastructure)

Manage daily site execution, track labour productivity, materials and subcontractors with ease. SiteFlow gives civil, interior and infrastructure contractors real-time control over work progress, costs and profitability.

SiteFlow ERP

Everything You Need to Manage Construction Projects in One Platform

Our cloud-based construction site management software integrates powerful modules for project planning, material and inventory control, workforce management, subcontractor coordination, budgeting and financial reporting all within an intuitive interface that’s as simple as WhatsApp.

Project & Site Management

Manage tasks, schedules, site progress, materials and labour with SiteFlow construction site management software

Cost Control & Project Profitability

Track construction expenses, material costs and labour spending to improve project margins with SiteFlow.

Insights & Resource Tracking

Get real-time insights into timelines, costs, labour and material usage across multiple construction projects.

Take Complete Control of your Projects with SiteFlow

Managing construction projects means juggling deadlines, budgets, and resources often across multiple sites. SiteFlow gives you a unified platform to plan, execute, and monitor everything from one place.

Multi Level Approvals

Every purchase request, vendor bill, subcontractor payment, and site expense goes through a defined approval chain before any commitment is made. No bypassing. No verbal authorizations that leave no record. Every approval decision is logged with the approver name, timestamp, and action taken so management always knows who authorized what and when.

Multi Site Visibility from One Dashboard

Owners and directors see project health, labour attendance, procurement status, and financial performance across every active site from one dashboard without calling individual project managers for updates. Problems surface through the system before they reach clients, giving management enough lead time to intervene before delays and cost overruns compound.

Budget vs Actuals in Real Time

Every material receipt, labour wage, subcontractor bill, and site expense updates project cost data the moment it is recorded at site. Finance teams and project managers see the same live numbers without waiting for end-of-month reconciliation. Budget overruns surface as they develop, not after the damage is already done and recovery is no longer possible.

Finance Connected to Operations

In most construction companies, finance teams work from invoices and bank statements while site teams work from WhatsApp updates and paper registers. SiteFlow connects both on the same platform. A material delivery recorded at site flows into procurement, updates inventory, triggers bill matching, and reflects in project P&L without anyone re-entering data between systems.

Core Features of SiteFlow Construction Management Software

Stop juggling between WhatsApp, Excel, Tally, and paper registers. SiteFlow is India’s most comprehensive platform that unifies every aspect of your operations, from planning and procurement to execution and accounting.

Project Management

SiteFlow connects your sites and office seamlessly. Track progress, manage tasks and update work from the SiteFlow mobile app, while the desktop platform provides powerful tools for planning, budgeting and detailed reporting.

Connect office to site

Create DPRs in a click

Track issues & delays in realtime

Material & Inventory Management

Efficiently track, manage and control construction materials in real time with SiteFlow’s integrated material and inventory management system. As part of SiteFlow’s construction management software, it gives you full control over material flow, budgets and supplier balances across sites.

Automate RFQ – PO – GRN workflow

Control material budget with approval flow

Track supplier balances in real time

GPS Based Attendance & Labour Management

No more paper registers or guesswork. SiteFlow ERP gives you accurate attendance & payroll management. Efficiently track your workforce & payroll with smart workforce management.

Monitor daily attendance using GPS

Manage labour costs & payments

Punch in & Punch out control

Billing & Expense Management

With robust financial management tools, gain full visibility over your project finances with real-time tracking to optimize cash flow for better profitability. Try construction financial management today.

Track budgets Vs expenses

Track project-wise P&L updated in real time

Quick invoices, faster collections

Subcontractors & Vendor Management

Manage construction contractors, suppliers & vendors without the chaos. No more miscommunication or delays. Establish clear expectations & accountability, leading to more reliable & consistent vendor interactions with #1 construction ERP for subcontractor management.

Create subcontractor work orders

Monitor progress against order

Manage contracts, invoices & payments

Digitize your Construction Projects with SiteFlow AI

Every attendance entry, material receipt, site photograph, and activity update your teams record daily becomes intelligence. SiteFlow AI turns that verified site data into decisions so owners, project managers, site engineers, and finance teams always know what is happening and what needs attention next.

SiteFlow in the News

SiteFlow has been recognized by India’s leading business and technology media for bringing construction ERP software built specifically for the way Indian companies operate.

What makes SiteFlow Construction Management
Software Different from Others

When companies use Excel for materials, WhatsApp for site updates, Tally for accounting, and email for approvals, each function operates in isolation. Data never syncs automatically. Reconciliation happens manually and too late. Cost overruns surface only after margins have eroded. Complete construction lifecycle management requires integrated systems where every transaction connects across modules without duplicate entry or version conflicts.

Built with Construction Experts, For Construction Experts

SiteFlow is designed specifically for construction professionals not just generic ERP users. From small builders to multi-site developers, we continuously evolve our features based on real-world input from the jobsite. Our tools streamline communication, automate site workflows, and adapt to the fast-paced nature.

Consistent Feature
Enhancements

We release product updates regularly to reflect changing on-site demands. Whether it’s improving mobile usability, adding new integrations like Tally or Zoho, or refining features like GPS attendance and cost tracking, every release is made to remove friction and boost productivity.

Templates Built for Construction Teams

Preloaded with ready-to-use templates for project planning, material procurement, subcontractor billing, daily reports, and invoicing. These templates are fully customizable to match your internal processes saving time and reducing rework.

Dashboards and Smart Reports

Track project progress, labor productivity, cost-to-completion, and profit margins all from centralized, interactive dashboards. Real-time analytics help project managers and company owners make informed decisions without switching between ERP softwares & tools.

Smooth Migration from Excel & Other Tools

Moving from spreadsheets, WhatsApp, or disconnected tools? Our onboarding team makes it easy. We import your data, contacts, and site records to set you up on SiteFlow construction management software fast and without any hassle.

Construction ERP Software That Integrates with Your Existing Tools

SiteFlow connects seamlessly with the tools your team already uses, so project data flows into one system without duplication or confusion. Our platform integrates with accounting, communication and productivity tools like Tally, Zoho Books, SAP, WhatsApp and Excel.

FAQs

What is Construction Management Software?

Construction Management Software (CMS) is a digital platform designed to plan, execute, and monitor construction projects from start to finish. It manages workflows, schedules, resources, and communication. However, a true Construction ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) goes further. SiteFlow is a specialized ERP that focuses on cost control by integrating financial data with site activity. This means we track every material indent, labor hour, and procurement cost in real-time a level of detail generic CMS and PM tools cannot match.

What is the best construction management software (CMS) in India?

SiteFlow is one of India’s leading construction management platforms used by 10,000+ contractors for cost control, project tracking, and accurate billing. SiteFlow website and app gives the flexibility for your office and field team to collaborate in real time with connected workflow

How can the SiteFlow benefit construction companies?

The SiteFlow ERP software streamlines site management, making it effortless to handle multiple sites. It automates labor attendance and salary calculations, saving valuable time and effort. Additionally, it fosters seamless teamwork, boosts productivity, and ensures effective collaboration.

How does project management software for construction help reduce cost?

It prevents wastage, tracks materials, automates billing, and aligns teams reducing project costs by 7–10%.

How is SiteFlow is different from other construction ERP systems?

Unlike traditional ERP software that is complex and time-consuming to deploy, SiteFlow is built specifically for construction project management. It offers real-time site updates through a mobile app and advanced planning through a desktop ERP, ensuring faster adoption, easy usability, and end-to-end control of your projects.

Does SiteFlow work on both mobile and desktop?

Yes. SiteFlow construction management ERP software is a hybrid platform with a user-friendly construction management mobile app for real-time construction site tracking and a robust desktop ERP software for advanced planning, analytics, and financial management. This dual approach ensures that site engineers, project managers, and office teams stay connected and updated at all times.

Does SiteFlow Construction software system integrate with accounting tools?

Yes. SiteFlow integrates seamlessly with Tally and Zoho Books, ensuring your construction ERP data such as vendor bills, client invoices, and project expenses—syncs automatically with your accounting software without manual entry.
